case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. VANESA MEZA ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VANESA MEZA ORTIZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, VANESA MEZA $726.49 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $806.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
